title: check constraints ddl can't return forever
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `t1` (`a` int DEFAULT NULL, `b` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL);
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD CONSTRAINT chk1 CHECK (a > 0);
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD CONSTRAINT chk2 CHECK (b IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE t1 DROP CONSTRAINT chk1;
key_bug_features: Dropping check constraint causes indefinite DDL job cancellation
